summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-settings (Environment/Speech) revert to default values when switching between them on Free 60 and Free 20
description_clean: Settings for Transparency mode (Environment and Speech sub-settings) are not properly applied or saved. When the user sets Transparency to Environment, closes settings, then reopens and sets it to Speech (or vice versa), the setting reverts to a default (Speech on Surround 85, Environment on Free 60 and Free 20) instead of saving the user's selection.
steps: 2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
6. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away or press Home).
8. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
9. Observe the current Transparency Mode setting.
10. Change the Transparency Mode setting to Speech.
11. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app again.
13. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
14. Observe the current Transparency Mode setting.
expected: The Transparency Mode setting should persist and reflect the user's last selection (e.g., if set to Environment, it should remain Environment after reopening; if set to Speech, it should remain Speech).
actual: The Transparency Mode setting reverts to default values: Speech defaults to Surround 85, Environment defaults to Free 60 and Free 20, instead of saving the user's selection.
